mechanism: AI capex sustains profits via Kalecki → profits attract capital inflows from global investors → capital inflows sustain dollar overvaluation. The 'capex dollar' is the investment channel of this loop.
regime_dependence: Self-reinforcing loop in expansion phase. Vulnerable to reversal if capex cuts reduce profits, reducing capital inflow attractiveness. The DOGE fiscal paradox suggests fiscal consolidation could independently break the loop.
